paragraphs.title: Watching the Ant Hill
paragraphs.overlookQuestion: What do the ants seem to be doing on the hill?
paragraphs.overlookHintKo: к°ңлҜёл“Өмқҙ м–ёлҚ• мң„м—җм„ң м–ҙл–»кІҢ мӣҖм§ҒмқҙлҠ”м§Җ лЁјм Җ мӮҙнҺҙлҙҗмҡ”.

sentences.text: Have you seen ants busy running over a hill of dirt?

chunks.decodeHint: HaveлҠ” /hГҰv/, seenмқҖ кёҙ e мҶҢлҰ¬лЎң мқҪм–ҙмҡ”.
antsмқҳ tsлҘј л¶ҷм—¬ мқҪкі , runningмқҖ run-ningмңјлЎң лӮҳлҲ мҡ”.
overлҠ” o-ver л‘җ л°•мһҗ, hillмқҖ м§§мқҖ i мҶҢлҰ¬мҳҲмҡ”.
dirtмқҳ irмқҖ н•ң мҶҢлҰ¬мІҳлҹј /Йҷr/м—җ к°Җк№қкІҢ мқҪм–ҙмҡ”.

sentences.text: They may look like they are just running around.

chunks.decodeHint: mayлҠ” кёҙ a, lookмқҖ ooлҘј м§§кІҢ мқҪм–ҙмҡ”.
justмқҳ j мҶҢлҰ¬мҷҖ runningмқҳ -ingмқ„ лҳҗл ·н•ҳкІҢ мқҪм–ҙмҡ”.
aroundлҠ” a-round л‘җ л¶Җл¶„мңјлЎң лӮҳлҲ  мқҪм–ҙмҡ”.

sentences.text: But the ants built that hill to live in, and each ant has work to do.

chunks.decodeHint: liveмқҳ iлҠ” м§§мқҖ i мҶҢлҰ¬, мүјн‘ңм—җм„ң мӮҙм§қ мү¬м–ҙмҡ”.
workмқҳ orлҠ” /Йҷr/ мҶҢлҰ¬м—җ к°Җк№қкі , doлҠ” кёҙ oo мҶҢлҰ¬мҳҲмҡ”.

sentences.text: Some ants may disappear into a small hole in the hill.

chunks.decodeHint: SomeмқҖ м§§мқҖ uмІҳлҹј, antsмқҳ лҒқ tsлҘј л¶ҷм—¬ мқҪм–ҙмҡ”.
intoлҠ” in-to, holeмқҖ лҒқ e л•Ңл¬ём—җ кёҙ oмҳҲмҡ”.

sentences.text: The hole is the door to their nest.

chunks.decodeHint: TheлҠ” лӢӨмқҢ л§җм—җ л¶ҷм—¬ л¶Җл“ңлҹҪкІҢ мқҪкі , holeмқҖ кёҙ oмҳҲмҡ”.
theirлҠ” th мҶҢлҰ¬лҘј нҳҖлҒқмңјлЎң, nestлҠ” м§§мқҖ eмҳҲмҡ”.

paragraphs.title: Inside the Nest
paragraphs.overlookHintKo: к°ңлҜё м–ёлҚ• м•„лһҳм—җ мһҲлҠ” л°©кіј н„°л„җмқ„ л– мҳ¬лҰ¬л©° мқҪм–ҙ лҙҗмҡ”.

sentences.text: These are harvester ants.

chunks.decodeHint: TheseлҠ” th мҶҢлҰ¬ л’Өм—җ кёҙ e мҶҢлҰ¬мҳҲмҡ”.

sentences.text: Their nest is made of lots of rooms and tunnels.

chunks.decodeHint: TheirлҠ” th мҶҢлҰ¬лЎң мӢңмһ‘н•ҳкі , nestлҠ” м§§мқҖ eмҳҲмҡ”.
madeлҠ” лҒқ e л•Ңл¬ём—җ кёҙ a мҶҢлҰ¬мҳҲмҡ”.
lots ofлҠ” мқҙм–ҙ мқҪкі , roomsлҠ” ooлҘј кёёкІҢ мқҪм–ҙмҡ”.
tunnelsлҠ” tun-nels л‘җ л¶Җл¶„мңјлЎң лӮҳлҲ  мқҪм–ҙмҡ”.

sentences.text: These little insects made them all.

chunks.decodeHint: littleмқҖ lit-tle, insectsлҠ” in-sectsлЎң лӮҳлҲ  мқҪм–ҙмҡ”.
madeлҠ” лҒқ e л•Ңл¬ём—җ кёҙ a мҶҢлҰ¬мҳҲмҡ”.
themмқҳ thлҘј л¶Җл“ңлҹҪкІҢ мқҪкі  allмқҖ кёёкІҢ мқҪм–ҙмҡ”.

sentences.text: Underneath the hill there may be miles of tunnels and hundreds of rooms.

chunks.decodeHint: thereмқҳ thмҷҖ mayмқҳ кёҙ aлҘј нҷ•мқён•ҙмҡ”.
milesлҠ” кёҙ i, tunnelsлҠ” tun-nelsлЎң лӮҳлҲ мҡ”.
hundredsлҠ” hun-dredsлЎң лӮҳлҲ„кі  roomsлҠ” ooлҘј кёёкІҢ мқҪм–ҙмҡ”.

sentences.text: The floors are worn smooth by thousands of ant feet.

chunks.decodeHint: thousandsлҠ” thou-sands, feetлҠ” кёҙ e мҶҢлҰ¬мҳҲмҡ”.

sentences.text: It is dark inside the nest.

chunks.decodeHint: darkмқҳ arлҠ” кёёкІҢ мһ…мқ„ м—ҙм–ҙ мқҪм–ҙмҡ”.

sentences.text: But the ants stay cozy.

chunks.decodeHint: ants лҒқмқҳ ts мҶҢлҰ¬лҘј л¶ҷм—¬ мқҪм–ҙмҡ”.
stayлҠ” st мҶҢлҰ¬мҷҖ кёҙ a, cozyлҠ” co-zyлЎң лӮҳлҲ мҡ”.

paragraphs.title: Work and Food in the Ant City
paragraphs.overlookQuestion: What jobs do worker ants do with food?
paragraphs.overlookHintKo: мқјк°ңлҜёл“Өмқҙ лЁ№мқҙлҘј к°Җм ёмҳӨкі  лӮҳлҲ„кі  м ҖмһҘн•ҳлҠ” нқҗлҰ„мқ„ мӮҙнҺҙлҙҗмҡ”.

sentences.text: In the rooms of the nest, worker ants do many different kinds of work.

chunks.text: In the rooms of the nest,
chunks.decodeHint: roomsлҠ” ooлҘј кёёкІҢ, nestлҠ” м§§мқҖ eлЎң мқҪм–ҙмҡ”.
workerлҠ” work-erлЎң лӮҳлҲ„кі  antsмқҳ tsлҘј л¶ҷм—¬мҡ”.

sentences.text: It is like a city, a busy city of ants.

chunks.decodeHint: likeлҠ” кёҙ i, cityлҠ” ci-tyлЎң лӮҳлҲ мҡ”.

sentences.text: Some ants have brought in food to the ant city.

chunks.decodeHint: SomeмқҖ м§§мқҖ uмІҳлҹј, antsмқҳ tsлҘј л¶ҷм—¬мҡ”.
broughtлҠ” br мҶҢлҰ¬лЎң мӢңмһ‘н•ҳкі  oughtлҘј н•ң лҚ©м–ҙлҰ¬лЎң мқҪм–ҙмҡ”.

sentences.text: These harvester ants like seeds.

chunks.decodeHint: TheseлҠ” кёҙ e, harvesterлҠ” har-ves-terлЎң лӮҳлҲ мҡ”.
likeлҠ” лҒқ e л•Ңл¬ём—җ кёҙ i мҶҢлҰ¬мҳҲмҡ”.

sentences.text: A worker ant cracks the husks off the seeds.

chunks.decodeHint: cracksлҠ” crлЎң мӢңмһ‘н•ҳкі  лҒқ ksлҘј л¶ҷм—¬мҡ”.
husksлҠ” м§§мқҖ uмҷҖ лҒқ sksлҘј нҷ•мқён•ҙмҡ”.
offлҠ” м§§мқҖ o, seedsлҠ” кёҙ eмҳҲмҡ”.

sentences.text: Another worker will take the husks outside to throw away.

chunks.decodeHint: takeлҠ” лҒқ e л•Ңл¬ём—җ кёҙ aмҳҲмҡ”.

sentences.text: The ants chew the seeds to get the juices out.

chunks.decodeHint: chewлҠ” chлЎң мӢңмһ‘н•ҳкі  seedsлҠ” кёҙ eмҳҲмҡ”.

sentences.text: Then they feed the juices to the other ants.

chunks.decodeHint: feedлҠ” кёҙ e, juicesлҠ” jui-cesлЎң лӮҳлҲ мҡ”.

sentences.text: Other workers store seeds for the ants to eat another time.

chunks.decodeHint: OtherлҠ” o-ther, workersлҠ” work-ersлЎң лӮҳлҲ мҡ”.
storeлҠ” кёҙ o, seedsлҠ” кёҙ eмҳҲмҡ”.

sentences.text: Not all ants store food.

chunks.decodeHint: NotмқҖ м§§мқҖ o, antsмқҳ tsлҘј л¶ҷм—¬мҡ”.

sentences.text: But harvester ants do.
In one room of the nest, a queen ant lays eggs.

chunks.text: In one room of the nest,
chunks.decodeHint: roomмқҖ кёҙ oo, nestлҠ” м§§мқҖ eмҳҲмҡ”.
eggsлҠ” м§§мқҖ eмҷҖ лҒқ gsлҘј л¶ҷм—¬мҡ”.

paragraphs.title: The Queen and Growing Ants
paragraphs.overlookQuestion: How do eggs become more ants?
paragraphs.overlookHintKo: м—¬мҷ•к°ңлҜё, м•Ң, м• лІҢл Ҳ, лІҲлҚ°кё°, м–ҙлҘё к°ңлҜёмқҳ мҲңм„ңлҘј мғқк°Ғн•ҳл©° мқҪм–ҙ лҙҗмҡ”.

sentences.text: Workers carry the eggs away to other rooms to take care of them.

chunks.decodeHint: takeлҠ” кёҙ a, careлҠ” кёҙ airмІҳлҹј мқҪм–ҙмҡ”.

sentences.text: Each ant city has to have at least one queen.

chunks.decodeHint: EachлҠ” кёҙ e, cityлҠ” ci-tyлЎң лӮҳлҲ мҡ”.

sentences.text: Without a queen there would be no ant city.

chunks.decodeHint: thereмқҳ thмҷҖ wouldмқҳ л¬өмқҢ lмқ„ нҷ•мқён•ҙмҡ”.

sentences.text: All the other ants in the ant city grow from the eggs the queen lays.

chunks.decodeHint: queenмқҖ кёҙ e, laysлҠ” кёҙ aмҳҲмҡ”.

sentences.text: At first the tiny eggs grow into larvae.
The worker ants feed the larvae and lick them clean so they will grow well.

chunks.decodeHint: feedлҠ” кёҙ e, larvaeлҠ” lar-vaeлЎң лӮҳлҲ мҡ”.
lickмқҖ м§§мқҖ i, cleanмқҖ кёҙ eмҳҲмҡ”.
growлҠ” кёҙ o, wellмқҖ м§§мқҖ eмҳҲмҡ”.

sentences.text: The larvae grow into pupae.
The workers keep grooming the pupae until they grow into adults.

chunks.decodeHint: keepмқҖ кёҙ e, groomingмқҖ groom-ingмңјлЎң лӮҳлҲ мҡ”.

sentences.text: The queen ant lays thousands and thousands of eggs.
Most of the eggs grow into worker ants.

chunks.decodeHint: MostлҠ” кёҙ o, eggsлҠ” м§§мқҖ eмҳҲмҡ”.

sentences.text: There may be only one queen ant in an ant city, but there can be many thousands of workers.

chunks.decodeHint: Thereмқҳ thмҷҖ mayмқҳ кёҙ aлҘј нҷ•мқён•ҙмҡ”.
butмқҳ м§§мқҖ uмҷҖ thereмқҳ thлҘј мқҪм–ҙмҡ”.

sentences.text: The queen doesnвҖҷt tell the workers what to do.

chunks.decodeHint: whatмқҳ whмҷҖ doмқҳ кёҙ ooлҘј нҷ•мқён•ҙмҡ”.

paragraphs.title: Workers Build and Search
paragraphs.overlookQuestion: How do worker ants keep the ant city alive?
paragraphs.overlookHintKo: мқјк°ңлҜёл“Өмқҙ н•Ёк»ҳ мқјн•ҳкі  м§‘мқ„ л„“нһҲкі  лЁ№мқҙлҘј м°ҫлҠ” мһҘл©ҙмқ„ л– мҳ¬л Ө лҙҗмҡ”.

sentences.text: But the workers are busy.
Each ant has work to do.

chunks.decodeHint: EachлҠ” кёҙ e, antлҠ” м§§мқҖ aмҳҲмҡ”.
workмқҳ orмҷҖ doмқҳ кёҙ ooлҘј нҷ•мқён•ҙмҡ”.

sentences.text: Ants work together to keep the whole ant city alive.
Workers make the nest bigger by digging new rooms and tunnels.
They use their feet to dig like tiny dogs.

chunks.decodeHint: useлҠ” кёҙ u, feetлҠ” кёҙ eмҳҲмҡ”.

sentences.text: Workers pick up pieces of dirt in their jaws and вҖңbeardsвҖқ and carry them outside.

chunks.decodeHint: jawsмқҳ awмҷҖ beardsмқҳ ear мҶҢлҰ¬лҘј нҷ•мқён•ҙмҡ”.

sentences.text: Dirt from the digging is what makes the anthill.

chunks.decodeHint: whatмқҖ wh, makesлҠ” кёҙ a л’Ө ksмҳҲмҡ”.

sentences.text: Ants are great diggers and builders.

chunks.decodeHint: greatлҠ” кёҙ a, diggersмҷҖ buildersлҠ” -ersлҘј нҷ•мқён•ҙмҡ”.

sentences.text: Imagine all the tiny pieces of dirt it takes to build a hill two feet high.

chunks.text: all the tiny pieces of dirt

sentences.text: Out around the harvester anthill, workers look for food.
Harvester ants mostly eat seeds.
But sometimes they eat insects, too.

paragraphs.title: Safety, Antennas, and Strength
paragraphs.overlookQuestion: How do ants protect themselves and work together?
paragraphs.overlookHintKo: к°ңлҜёк°Җ л¬јкұ°лӮҳ мҸҳлҠ” мқҙмң , лҚ”л“¬мқҙ, нһҳмқ„ мғқк°Ғн•ҳл©° мқҪм–ҙ лҙҗмҡ”.

sentences.text: Ants can bite and sting other insects to capture them or to protect themselves.

chunks.decodeHint: biteлҠ” кёҙ i, stingмқҖ м§§мқҖ iмҳҲмҡ”.
protectлҠ” pro-tect, themselvesлҠ” them-selvesлЎң лӮҳлҲ мҡ”.

sentences.text: Be careful, because some kinds of ants can bite or sting you, too.

chunks.decodeHint: biteлҠ” кёҙ i, stingмқҖ м§§мқҖ iмҳҲмҡ”.

sentences.text: Harvester ants will bite or sting if you disturb their nest.

chunks.decodeHint: biteлҠ” кёҙ i, stingмқҖ м§§мқҖ iмҳҲмҡ”.
theirмқҳ thмҷҖ nestмқҳ м§§мқҖ eлҘј нҷ•мқён•ҙмҡ”.

sentences.text: Ants use their antennas to help them find food.

chunks.decodeHint: findлҠ” кёҙ i, foodлҠ” кёҙ ooмҳҲмҡ”.

sentences.text: They touch and smell with their antennas.

chunks.decodeHint: touchлҠ” м§§мқҖ u, smellмқҖ м§§мқҖ eмҳҲмҡ”.

sentences.text: If one ant finds food, others follow.

chunks.decodeHint: oneмқҖ w мҶҢлҰ¬лЎң мӢңмһ‘н•ҳкі  antлҠ” м§§мқҖ aмҳҲмҡ”.
findsлҠ” кёҙ i, foodлҠ” кёҙ ooмҳҲмҡ”.

sentences.text: Soon there will be a lot of ants carrying away lunch.

chunks.decodeHint: thereмқҳ thмҷҖ willмқҳ м§§мқҖ iлҘј нҷ•мқён•ҙмҡ”.
lotмқҖ м§§мқҖ o, antsмқҳ tsлҘј л¶ҷм—¬мҡ”.
carryingмқҖ car-ry-ing, awayлҠ” a-wayлЎң лӮҳлҲ мҡ”.

sentences.text: If one ant canвҖҷt carry something, others may help.

chunks.decodeHint: oneмқҖ w мҶҢлҰ¬лЎң мӢңмһ‘н•ҳкі  antлҠ” м§§мқҖ aмҳҲмҡ”.
mayлҠ” кёҙ a, helpлҠ” м§§мқҖ eмҳҲмҡ”.

sentences.text: But each worker ant is strong.

chunks.decodeHint: eachлҠ” кёҙ e, workerлҠ” work-erлЎң лӮҳлҲ мҡ”.

sentences.text: An ant can lift as much as fifty times its own weight.
If people could lift like that, we could each lift a car.

chunks.decodeHint: couldмқҳ lмқҖ л¬өмқҢ, liftлҠ” м§§мқҖ iмҳҲмҡ”.
couldмқҳ lмқҖ л¬өмқҢ, eachлҠ” кёҙ eмҳҲмҡ”.

sentences.text: The workers carry the food back to the ant city.

paragraphs.title: Many Ant Cities Anywhere
paragraphs.overlookQuestion: Where can different kinds of ants make their cities?
paragraphs.overlookHintKo: к°ңлҜё мў…лҘҳл§ҲлӢӨ м§‘мқ„ л§Ңл“ңлҠ” кіімқҙ м–ҙл–»кІҢ лӢӨлҘём§Җ мӮҙнҺҙлҙҗмҡ”.

sentences.text: Ants share the food they find.

chunks.decodeHint: theyлҠ” кёҙ aмІҳлҹј, findлҠ” кёҙ iмҳҲмҡ”.

sentences.text: Ants eat many foods.

chunks.decodeHint: manyлҠ” man-y, foodsмқҳ ooлҠ” кёёкІҢ мқҪм–ҙмҡ”.

sentences.text: But different kinds of ants like different foods.
There are over 10,000 kinds of ants.
The different kinds of ants have found many ways to make their cities, so they can live in many kinds of places.

chunks.decodeHint: differentлҠ” dif-fer-ent, kindsмҷҖ ants лҒқмҶҢлҰ¬лҘј нҷ•мқён•ҙмҡ”.
manyлҠ” man-y, waysлҠ” кёҙ a мҶҢлҰ¬мҳҲмҡ”.
makeлҠ” кёҙ a, citiesлҠ” cit-iesлЎң лӮҳлҲ мҡ”.

chunks.text: so they can live in many kinds of places.
chunks.meaningKo: к·ёлһҳм„ң л§ҺмқҖ кіім—җм„ң мӮҙ мҲҳ мһҲлҸ„лЎқ

sentences.text: Janitor ants make their nests in hollowed-out tree twigs.

chunks.decodeHint: theirмқҳ thмҷҖ nests лҒқ stsлҘј нҷ•мқён•ҙмҡ”.

sentences.text: The soldier janitor antвҖ”a kind of worker antвҖ”has a big, plug-shaped head it can use for a door.

chunks.text: The soldier janitor antвҖ”a kind of worker antвҖ”
chunks.decodeHint: soldierмҷҖ janitorлҘј лӮҳлҲ„кі  лҢҖмӢңм—җм„ң мӮҙм§қ мү¬м–ҙмҡ”.

sentences.text: Many kinds of ants make hills or mounds.

chunks.decodeHint: ManyлҠ” man-y, kindsмҷҖ ants лҒқмҶҢлҰ¬лҘј нҷ•мқён•ҙмҡ”.
hillsлҠ” м§§мқҖ i, moundsлҠ” ou мҶҢлҰ¬мҳҲмҡ”.

sentences.text: If you havenвҖҷt seen harvester anthills, maybe youвҖҷve seen the round-topped hills that formica ants make.

chunks.decodeHint: havenвҖҷtлҠ” have-nвҖҷtлЎң лӮҳлҲ„кі  seenмқҖ кёҙ eмҳҲмҡ”.

sentences.text: Sometimes they cover their hills with thatch.

chunks.decodeHint: theirмқҳ thмҷҖ hillsмқҳ м§§мқҖ iлҘј нҷ•мқён•ҙмҡ”.

sentences.text: Or you may have seen pavement ants.

chunks.decodeHint: mayлҠ” кёҙ a, seenмқҖ кёҙ eмҳҲмҡ”.

sentences.text: They can live under the sidewalk.
Or carpenter ants, who build their nests in rotting wood.
There are small ant cities with just a few ants.

chunks.decodeHint: smallмқҳ sm, citiesлҠ” cit-iesлЎң лӮҳлҲ мҡ”.
fewлҠ” кёҙ u, antsмқҳ tsлҘј л¶ҷм—¬мҡ”.

sentences.text: There are big ant cities with many, many ants.

chunks.decodeHint: bigмқҖ м§§мқҖ i, citiesлҠ” cit-iesлЎң лӮҳлҲ мҡ”.

sentences.text: Ants have been found at the tops of the highest buildings and on ships at sea.

chunks.decodeHint: beenмқҖ м§§мқҖ iмІҳлҹј, foundлҠ” ou мҶҢлҰ¬мҳҲмҡ”.
highestлҠ” high-est, buildingsлҠ” build-ingsлЎң лӮҳлҲ мҡ”.
ships лҒқмқҳ psмҷҖ seaмқҳ кёҙ eлҘј нҷ•мқён•ҙмҡ”.

sentences.text: Ants can make their cities almost anywhere.

chunks.decodeHint: almostлҠ” al-most, anywhereлҠ” any-whereлЎң лӮҳлҲ мҡ”.

sentences.text: Look around and youвҖҷll probably find an ant city, busy with ants.

chunks.decodeHint: youвҖҷllмқҖ м§§кІҢ л¶ҷмқҙкі , probablyлҠ” prob-a-blyлЎң лӮҳлҲ мҡ”.
